testCases.title: [Normal] Valid login with correct credentials
testCases.precondition: User account exists and is active
steps: Send POST /api/auth/login with valid username and password
Verify response contains JWT token in data.token

testCases.title: [Exception] Login with incorrect password
steps: Send POST /api/auth/login with valid username and wrong password

testCases.title: [Boundary] Password exactly 8 characters (minimum)
testCases.expected: HTTP 200 if password correct, login successful

testCases.title: [Permission] Login with disabled account
testCases.precondition: Admin has disabled the test user account
steps: Send POST /api/auth/login with disabled account credentials
